name: Floctafenine
description: Floctafenine is an anti-inflammatory analgesic similar in action to aspirin. Floctafenine inhibits prostaglandin synthesis.

interactions.name: Esmolol
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Esmolol is combined with Floctafenine.

interactions.name: Sarilumab
interactions.description: Sarilumab may increase the immunosuppressive activities of Floctafenine.

interactions.name: Torasemide
interactions.description: Floctafenine may decrease the diuretic activities of Torasemide.

interactions.name: Furosemide
interactions.description: Floctafenine may decrease the diuretic activities of Furosemide.

interactions.description: Floctafenine may decrease the diuretic activities of Bumetanide.

interactions.description: Floctafenine may decrease the diuretic activities of Piretanide.

interactions.name: Lithium
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Lithium can be increased when it is combined with Floctafenine.

interactions.name: Methotrexate
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Methotrexate can be increased when it is combined with Floctafenine.

interactions.name: Tenofovir disoproxil
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Floctafenine is combined with Tenofovir disoproxil.

interactions.name: Sodium phosphate
interactions.description: Sodium phosphate may increase the nephrotoxic activities of Floctafenine.

interactions.name: Betrixaban
interactions.description: The risk or severity of bleeding can be increased when Betrixaban is combined with Floctafenine.

interactions.name: Cyclosporine
interactions.description: Floctafenine may increase the nephrotoxic activities of Cyclosporine.

interactions.name: Diclofenac
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Diclofenac is combined with Floctafenine.

interactions.name: Colestipol
interactions.description: Colestipol can cause a decrease in the absorption of Floctafenine resulting in a reduced serum concentration and potentially a decrease in efficacy.

interactions.name: Colesevelam
interactions.description: Colesevelam can cause a decrease in the absorption of Floctafenine resulting in a reduced serum concentration and potentially a decrease in efficacy.

interactions.name: Cholestyramine
interactions.description: Cholestyramine can cause a decrease in the absorption of Floctafenine resulting in a reduced serum concentration and potentially a decrease in efficacy.
